creator: freebsd@jonathanprice.org
text:
(In reply to Jason Helfman from comment #1)

Hello. Sorry to hear about your issues.

Are you saying that when you try to run the minecraft-client it crashes your X server? If this is the case you will want to submit a bug to the minecraft-client port, which is maintained by a different person.

If you do think that this minecraft-server port is causing an issue with your X server, please provide any information you can. This port doesn't make use of X so it shouldn't cause any issues.
